summary: Retest of iteration_12 fixes on Funnel page. Both fixes verified PASS. BYOK section renders with all 5 rows and correct content. Pricing badge shows 'MÁS POPULAR' in uppercase. Regression checks (5 pricing plans, monthly/annual toggle) also pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: data-testid selectors like pricing-currency-usd/cop and onboarding-step-1..5 do not exist in Funnel.jsx — USD/COP values are displayed inline in pricing cards (verified visually) and onboarding wizard is on a separate page. These were not part of the actual iteration_12 assertion set; no action needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_13 retest verified: (1) data-testid='funnel-byok' present with rows byok-row-0..4 all rendered with expected Spanish text mentioning ElevenLabs/Telnyx/Chatea Pro/Incluido. (2) pricing-recommended textContent === 'MÁS POPULAR' (uppercase, exact match). Regression: 5 pricing-plan-* nodes, pricing-toggle-monthly and pricing-toggle-annual present. No new issues discovered.
